description: Create and publish a WordPress post titled 'Renewable Energy Deployment and Technologies' using the content from ~/Documents/article_draft.txt. Format the sections 'Solar Energy Technologies', 'Wind Power Developments', and 'Energy Storage Solutions' as H2 headings, each with a unique HTML anchor. Replace the '[Insert Table of Contents Here]' placeholder with a bulleted list of jump links to these anchors. Convert the paragraph beginning with 'The transition to 100% renewable energy systems...' into a quote block and embed the provided YouTube URL at the '[Embed Video Here...]' placeholder. Assign the post to a new category named 'Educational'.

metadata.quote_start: The transition to 100% renewable energy systems
